prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约25623名→25287名→22193名→75136名→30107名。2021-2023年位次在2.2万-2.6万区间波动，2024年因批次合并及专业组调整出现异常断档至7.5万，2025年回归至30107名，较2023年后移约7914名，反映近年竞争格局变化；该校在四川理科/物理类招生计划：2021年73人→2022年68人→2023年68人→2024年78人→2025年83人→2026年91人。2026年较2025年扩招8人（+9.6%），扩招幅度明显，理论上对位次有下移（更易进）作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在80-83区间；宣城校区与本部同属一个招生代码，共享211/双一流身份，在理工类院校中具有较高认可度；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及学术不端事件）；抖音热度排名第77位（评价一般），短视频曝光量处于中低水平；2025年有热门专业投档线暴跌信号。整体声誉信号偏负面，可能对报考热度产生一定抑制；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A（唯一A类学科），其余学科未进入A-及以上；优势学科数量有限，对整体报考吸引力的拉动作用有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校工科定位契合；四川2026年高考总报名人数约53.5万人，较2025年约46.3万人增加约15.5%，物理类考生估算约32.9万人（较2025年28.5万增加约15.7%），考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次30107名、2026年扩招9.6%（位次下移因素）与四川物理类考生增加约15.7%（位次上移因素）的博弈，扩招幅度不及考生增幅，竞争压力总体加大；叠加声誉偏负面对报考热度的轻微抑制，预计2026年最低录取位次，区间31548-32548名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间31548-32548名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如31000名以内）可重点冲刺电气工程与智能控制、软件工程等热门工科专业；位次接近区间上限（如32500名左右）应以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次相对靠后的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 25623 → 25287 → 22193 → 75136 → 30107. Rankings fluctuated between 22,000 and 26,000 from 2021 to 2023. In 2024, due to batch merging and major group adjustments, there was an abnormal drop to 75,136. In 2025, it returned to 30,107, shifting back by about 7,914 places compared to 2023, reflecting changes in the competitive landscape in recent years. The enrollment plan for this university in Sichuan's science/physics category: 2021: 73 → 2022: 68 → 2023: 68 → 2024: 78 → 2025: 83 → 2026: 91. In 2026, compared to 2025, there is an expansion of 8 students (+9.6%), which is significant and theoretically has a downward effect on rankings (easier to enter).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 approximately 80th, with stable rankings in the 80-83 range in recent years. The Xuancheng Campus shares the same admission code as the main campus, enjoying the 211/Double First-Class status, and has high recognition among science and engineering universities. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (involving academic misconduct incidents). Douyin popularity ranking is 77th (average evaluation), with short video exposure at a medium-low level. In 2025, there were signals of a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors. Overall reputation signals are somewhat negative, potentially suppressing application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A (the only A-level discipline), while other disciplines did not reach A- or above. The number of advantageous disciplines is limited, providing limited pull for overall application attractiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electrical engineering and automation, electronic information/communication and other engineering majors are highly recommended in society, aligning with the university's engineering orientation. In 2026, the total number of Sichuan college entrance examination registrants is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% from about 463,000 in 2025. The estimated number of physics category candidates is about 329,000 (an increase of about 15.7% from 285,000 in 2025), with a significant expansion in candidate scale, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 30,107 in 2025, the 9.6% enrollment expansion in 2026 (downward factor) and the approximately 15.7% increase in Sichuan physics category candidates (upward factor), the expansion rate is less than the candidate growth rate, leading to increased overall competitive pressure. Combined with the slight suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative reputation, the predicted minimum admission ranking range for 2026 is 31,548-32,548.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 31,548-32,548, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 31,000), focus on applying for popular engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Intelligent Control and Software Engineering. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 32,500), prioritize Tier 3 majors, while also considering relatively lower-ranked majors in Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 4981 → 5387 → 5165 → 17719 → 6142. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 4981-5387 from 2021 to 2023, but in 2024, due to batch mergers and major group adjustments, there was an abnormal drop to 17719. In 2025, it returned to 6142, about 977 places lower than 2023, showing a slight overall downward trend. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Sichuan: 2021: 11 students → 2022: 11 → 2023: 10 → 2024: 8 → 2025: 8. The 2026 enrollment plan document does not include liberal arts/history category data, so plan_change is counted as 0 per rules, assuming the enrollment plan remains the same as 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science 2026 main ranking: 80th; Xuancheng Campus shares the 211 status, but the university is predominantly strong in science and engineering, with a small scale of liberal arts majors, resulting in relatively limited brand recognition among liberal arts candidates. The 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (academic misconduct incident); Douyin popularity ranking: 77th (average), with very little liberal arts-related exposure content. The 2025 abnormal admission signal shows a sharp drop in hot major admission scores, but mainly affects science. Overall reputation has limited direct impact on liberal arts applications. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, only Management Science and Engineering received an A rating, with no A-class disciplines in liberal arts. The liberal arts majors offered (English, Network and New Media) lack direct support from corresponding A-class disciplines, making disciplinary appeal average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: English/foreign language majors have generally lukewarm social popularity, while journalism and communication majors are clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of Sichuan Gaokao examinees is about 535,000, with history category examinees estimated at about 206,000 based on the recent proportion of about 38.5%, an increase of about 15.7% from 178,000 in 2025. The examinee pool expands, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 6142, unchanged enrollment plan, about 15.7% increase in history category examinees, and average popularity of liberal arts majors, overall competitive pressure increases. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is in the range of 5722-6722.
